attendancePolicy: Not mandatory, but attendance is helpful to understand steam tables.
summary: This course covers standard thermodynamic laws, cycles (Otto, Diesel, Rankine), and refrigeration. The professor teaches concepts through practical examples. Midsem and endsem are straightforward if you solve the tutorial problems. Make sure to learn how to read Steam Tables quickly as that saves a lot of time during exams.

selectionProcess:
1. Resume Shortlisting
2. Group Discussion (Case-based, e.g., warehouse optimization)
3. Technical Interview (Operations management, logistics, supply chain calculations, stress testing)
4. HR Interview
summary: Fascinating core project on optimizing the wheat sourcing network for a brand-new factory in Western India. I worked on reducing transit times and implementing statistical safety stock rules. Spent a week on-site in warehouses which was very eye-opening. Excellent mentorship and stipend, but the hours were intensive during site visits.
takeaways: Familiarize yourself with basic supply chain metrics (EOQ, safety stock, lead times). Excel skills must be top-notch as you will deal with massive data sheets. Read up on basic logistics concepts and be confident during the GD.
